Patch Set 2:

For patches not intended to land, you can mark them with:

 Test-Parameters: fortestonly

to prevent Maloo to mark the patch Verified +1 (will still run default tests unless also accompanied by "testlist="), or 

 Test-Parameters: forbuildonly

to only do the builds (which I suspect is what you want in this case).

If this is to land eventually the SLES build issue will need to be fixed at some point.

replaced by https://review.whamcloud.com/25168 ("LU-8943 lnd: Enable Multiple OPA Endpoints between Nodes")

commit.subject: LDEV-326 lnd: Enable Multiple OPA Endpoints between Nodes
commit.message:
LDEV-326 lnd: Enable Multiple OPA Endpoints between Nodes

OPA driver optimizations are based on the MPI model where it is
expected to have multiple endpoints between two given nodes. To
enable this optimization for Lustre, we need to make it possible,
via LND-specific tuneable, to create multiple endpoints and to
balance the traffic over them.

Signed-off-by: Doug Oucharek <doug.s.oucharek@intel.com>
Change-Id: I1abf4f0d68e2915cef767e726e5c4eda58fa70e0
